message:
fix(e2e): restore drilldown-modal testid trigger for UX Journey tests (Fixes #9166) (#9203)

Add testId prop to BaseModal and closeTestId prop to BaseModal.Header so
callers can attach data-testid attributes for E2E tests. Wire
data-testid="drilldown-modal" and data-testid="drilldown-close" to the
CardWrapper expanded-card modal so the UX Journey dashboard-overview tests
can locate the modal and close button after clicking the expand button.

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
